c.connect\('192.168.21.111', username='fangjin', password='YYZZ54321!'\)

Bash("D:/openclawVPS/tmp_upgrade.sh" << 'ENDOFSCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
DOCKER=/usr/local/bin/docker

upgrade_container\(\) {
    local cont=$1
    echo "=== Upgrading $cont ==="
    
    # Step 1: pnpm update
    echo "  [1/3] Running pnpm update..."
    $DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'cd /app && pnpm update @mariozechner/pi-ai 2>&1 | tail -10'
    
    # Step 2: Apply URL patch
    echo "  [2/3] Patching API URL..."
    $DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'sed -i "s|https://api.anthropic.com|http://127.0.0.1:8022|g" /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/dist/models.generated.js 2>&1 && echo "    patched OK"'
    
    # Step 3: Verify version
    echo "  [3/3] Verifying version..."
    $DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'cat /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/package.json 2>/dev/null | head -3 | tail -1'
    
    echo ""
}

upgrade_container aling-gateway
upgrade_container lain-gateway
upgrade_container lumi-gateway

echo "=== Final version check ==="
for cont in deploy-openclaw-gateway-1 aling-gateway lain-gateway lumi-gateway; do
    v=$\($DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'cat /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/package.json 2>/dev/null | head -3 | tail -1'\)
    echo "$cont: $v"
done
ENDOFSCRIPT)

Bash("D:/openclawVPS/tmp_run_upgrade.py" << 'ENDOFPY'
import paramiko
import sys
import os

os.environ['PYTHONIOENCODING'] = 'utf-8'

c = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
c.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
c.connect\('192.168.21.111', username='fangjin', password='YYZZ54321!'\)

sftp = c.open_sftp\(\)
sftp.put\(r'D:\\openclawVPS\\tmp_upgrade.sh', '/tmp/upgrade_piai.sh'\)
sftp.close\(\)

_, o, e = c.exec_command\('chmod +x /tmp/upgrade_piai.sh && bash /tmp/upgrade_piai.sh'\)
out = o.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
err = e.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
if out:
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(out.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b'\\n'\)
if err:
    sys.stderr.buffer.write\(b'STDERR: '\)
    sys.stderr.buffer.write\(err.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
    sys.stderr.buffer.write\(b'\\n'\)

exit_code = o.channel.recv_exit_status\(\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f'\\nExit code: {exit_code}\\n'.encode\(\)\)
c.close\(\)
ENDOFPY)

#!/bin/bash
DOCKER=/usr/local/bin/docker

upgrade_container\(\) {
    local cont=$1
    echo "=== Upgrading $cont ==="
    
    # Step 1: pnpm update with correct store dir
    echo "  [1/3] Running pnpm update \(using root store\)..."
    $DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'cd /app && pnpm config set store-dir /root/.local/share/pnpm/store/v10 && pnpm update @mariozechner/pi-ai 2>&1 | tail -10'
    
    # Step 2: Apply URL patch
    echo "  [2/3] Patching API URL..."
    $DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'sed -i "s|https://api.anthropic.com|http://127.0.0.1:8022|g" /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/dist/models.generated.js 2>&1 && echo "    patched OK"'
    
    # Step 3: Verify version
    echo "  [3/3] Verifying version..."
    $DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'cat /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/package.json 2>/dev/null | head -3 | tail -1'
    
    echo ""
}

upgrade_container aling-gateway
upgrade_container lain-gateway
upgrade_container lumi-gateway

echo "=== Final version check ==="

    v=$\($DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'cat /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/package.json 2>/dev/null | head -3 | tail -1'\)
    echo "$cont: $v"
done

Bash("D:/openclawVPS/tmp_upgrade3.sh" << 'ENDOFSCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
DOCKER=/usr/local/bin/docker

upgrade_container\(\) {
    local cont=$1
    echo "=== Upgrading $cont ==="
    
    # Step 1: pnpm update as root \(store was created by root during docker build\)
    echo "  [1/3] Running pnpm update as root..."
    $DOCKER exec -u root $cont bash -c 'cd /app && pnpm update @mariozechner/pi-ai 2>&1 | tail -10'
    
    # Fix ownership back to node
    $DOCKER exec -u root $cont bash -c 'chown -R node:node /app/node_modules 2>/dev/null'
    
    # Step 2: Apply URL patch
    echo "  [2/3] Patching API URL..."
    $DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'sed -i "s|https://api.anthropic.com|http://127.0.0.1:8022|g" /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/dist/models.generated.js 2>&1 && echo "    patched OK"'
    
    # Step 3: Verify version
    echo "  [3/3] Verifying version..."
    $DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'cat /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/package.json 2>/dev/null | head -3 | tail -1'
    
    echo ""
}

upgrade_container aling-gateway
upgrade_container lain-gateway
upgrade_container lumi-gateway

echo "=== Final version check ==="
for cont in deploy-openclaw-gateway-1 aling-gateway lain-gateway lumi-gateway; do
    v=$\($DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'cat /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/package.json 2>/dev/null | head -3 | tail -1'\)
    echo "$cont: $v"
done
ENDOFSCRIPT)

#!/bin/bash
DOCKER=/usr/local/bin/docker

upgrade_container\(\) {
    local cont=$1
    echo "=== Upgrading $cont ==="
    
    # Step 1: pnpm add specific version as root
    echo "  [1/3] Installing @mariozechner/pi-ai@0.52.10..."
    $DOCKER exec -u root $cont bash -c 'cd /app && pnpm add @mariozechner/pi-ai@0.52.10 2>&1 | tail -10'
    
    # Fix ownership back to node
    $DOCKER exec -u root $cont bash -c 'chown -R node:node /app/node_modules /app/package.json /app/pnpm-lock.yaml 2>/dev/null'
    
    # Step 2: Apply URL patch
    echo "  [2/3] Patching API URL..."
    $DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'sed -i "s|https://api.anthropic.com|http://127.0.0.1:8022|g" /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/dist/models.generated.js 2>&1 && echo "    patched OK"'
    
    # Step 3: Verify version
    echo "  [3/3] Verifying version..."
    $DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'cat /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@0.52.10*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/package.json 2>/dev/null | head -3 | tail -1'
    
    echo ""
}

upgrade_container aling-gateway
upgrade_container lain-gateway
upgrade_container lumi-gateway

echo "=== Final version check ==="
for cont in deploy-openclaw-gateway-1 aling-gateway lain-gateway lumi-gateway; do
    v=$\($DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'cd /app && node -p "require\(\\"./package.json\\"\).dependencies[\\"@mariozechner/pi-ai\\"]"'\)
    echo "$cont: $v"
done
ENDOFSCRIPT)

Bash("D:/openclawVPS/tmp_verify.sh" << 'ENDOFSCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
DOCKER=/usr/local/bin/docker

echo "=== Final Verification ==="
echo ""
echo "--- pi-ai versions ---"
for cont in deploy-openclaw-gateway-1 aling-gateway lain-gateway lumi-gateway; do
    v=$\($DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'cd /app && node -p "require\(\\"./package.json\\"\).dependencies[\\"@mariozechner/pi-ai\\"]"'\)
    echo "$cont: $v"
done

echo ""
echo "--- URL patch check \(should show 127.0.0.1:8022\) ---"
for cont in deploy-openclaw-gateway-1 aling-gateway lain-gateway lumi-gateway; do
    url=$\($DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'grep -o "http://127.0.0.1:8022" /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@0.52.10*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/dist/models.generated.js 2>/dev/null | head -1'\)
    anthropic=$\($DOCKER exec $cont bash -c 'grep -c "api.anthropic.com" /app/node_modules/.pnpm/@mariozechner+pi-ai@0.52.10*/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-ai/dist/models.generated.js 2>/dev/null'\)
    echo "$cont: patched=$url, anthropic_refs=$anthropic"
done

echo ""
echo "--- Docker image ---"
$DOCKER images openclaw --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}} {{.ID}} {{.CreatedAt}}"
ENDOFSCRIPT)
